name: Happy Poker
short_description: Dou Di Zhu + LTK + Roguelike = Happy Poker! A roguelike card strategy game inspired by Dou Di Zhu. Build custom decks, use rule cards to upgrade your hand, and strategize discards for explosive damage! With dozens of spell cards and relics, every game is a fresh, exciting challenge!
detailed_description:
Join Us！

Add to your wishlist/Join the group to get early access to the latest version of the game!

Discord:


About the Game

Story Background

It is said that within the ancient and mysterious Siam Temple lies a powerful artifact. To earn the artifact’s approval is to gain the divine power left behind by the gods. The guardians of this temple are none other than a pair of Siamese cats. Everything began on the day the guardians were about to give birth. At that moment, a surge of energy erupted from the temple, sweeping across the entire Elven Forest. The artifact was stolen. The king, furious, sent countless guards to search, but found nothing. In order to retrieve the artifact, Anze, the guardian of the temple, embarked on his own path of redemption…

In Happy Poker, you can build your deck however you like. The shop offers over 50 different rule cards with various effects, such as removing cards, adding specific suits, including 2 wild cards, changing the suit of your cards, and more! You can even modify your deck with relics, making a deck with 10 Kings no longer just a dream!

Rule cards and relics can also upgrade your card combinations—like Rocket, Full House, and Plane—to boost your attack power and deal explosive damage!

The game features a total of 108 spell cards, each with its own unique function. There’s Healing Touch for restoring health, Energy Gift for drawing extra cards, Spell Shield to nullify enemy spell cards, and many more exciting spells waiting for you to build and explore.

When choosing a character, you can even freely customize your starting spell deck, tailoring your spells to fit your character’s unique playstyle.

There are 14 unique characters, each with their own skills and playstyles. For example, Angie can turn all 5s into wild cards, making it easier to complete various hands. Lulu, on the other hand, starts with only Spades and Hearts in her deck, and with the right relics or rule cards, she can upgrade her Flush/Straight Flush to deal critical damage with a single hand!

More character builds waiting for you to discover!

Spell cards can be enchanted onto your hand. If you’re out of cards and can’t beat your opponent, try enchanting your hand! Use skills to clear your hand, and it will directly let you win the round with an attack. You can also use spell cards to make your opponent draw more cards, disrupting their strategy. But be careful — this rule applies to your opponent as well!

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
